title: Design a Visual Representation of a 3D Graph
scenario: Create a prompt that instructs an LLM to generate a high-quality visual representation of a 3D graph showcasing the relationships between multiple variables. The graph should include a clear title, axis labels, and data points. The output should be a PNG image.

evaluationCriteria.description: The clarity and resolution of the generated image.
The use of consistent colors throughout the image, including axis labels, title, and data points.
Whether the output adheres to all specified constraints.
